author: Nintendo Everything
text:
LEGO Zelda Great Deku Tree set being retired, here’s where you can get it [update: more Nintendo sets]

May 15: Various reports are indicating that the LEGO The Legend of Zelda Great Deku Tree is being retired. If you’ve yet to make a purchase, this could be your last chance to do so. As a reminder, the Great Deku Tree set pays homage to both Zelda: Ocarina of Time and Breath of the Wild. It comes with 2,500...

The post LEGO Zelda Great Deku Tree set being retired, here’s where you can get it [update: more Nintendo sets] appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Console Archives dev talks release plans and goals, wants to release over 800 games

Console Archives developer Hamster has spoken further about what’s planned going forward, including how many games we could ultimately see. Satoshi Hamada, the CEO and founder of Hamster Corporation, was talking about Console Archives in a recent Famitsu interview. He mentioned how during the planning stage, the company’s goal was “to reproduce every home console and every game ever”. Hamster...

The post Console Archives dev talks release plans and goals, wants to release over 800 games appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Pokemon Champions producer on how the team is deciding which Pokemon to include in the game and more

Pokemon Champions producer Masaaki Hoshino has shared a few comments about the game, including how the team is going about picking Pokemon. As previously mentioned, only select creatures were made available with the recent launch. Right now there’s around 200 – we have a complete list here. Hoshino was asked about the team’s approach to include Pokemon Champions in the...

The post Pokemon Champions producer on how the team is deciding which Pokemon to include in the game and more appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
